step_rationale: Tryptophan metabolite; cardioprotective in post-MI recovery phase.
mechanism: Isatin is a tryptophan metabolite with cardioprotective properties in post-MI myocardial repair and recovery.

references.title: Elevated isatin ameliorates heart injury in patients with myocardial infarction after rehabilitation treatment-based metabolomics screening.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
